emails.subject: GTC vs. Master
emails.body: GTC vs. Master Louise, The consensus which emerged from the meeting this morning is that the Power guys would like to have a full blown Master Agreement on EnronOnline instead of a simpler GTC. Obviously, I can put either onto EnronOnline, but wanted to let you know before we do so. If you want us to stick with a simple GTC, please let me know. Thanks, Dave

emails.subject: RE: GTC vs. Master
emails.body: RE: GTC vs. Master No master on EOL. GTC. To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: FW: GTC vs. Master
emails.body: FW: GTC vs. Master Copy of email I sent to Kevin as you requested, about a week ago. Dave To: Presto, Kevin M.
